channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: BYU outlasts Baylor in overtime, 93-89
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It was a perfect night for one BYU freshman, and a perfect ending for BYU Tuesday night against Baylor.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mike McCarthy withdraws from Saints' coaching search and won't coach in 2025, AP source says
item.description: Mike McCarthy has decided against coaching in 2025, removing himself as a candidate to fill the NFL's last remaining head coaching vacancy with the New Orleans Saints.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NFL star J.J. Watt has strong words for Pro Bowl after numerous players drop out
item.description: Twenty-four Pro Bowl alternates were named Tuesday, prompting five-time selection J.J. Watt to go scorched earth on what he suggests is a watered-down honor.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lions agree to hire Broncos' John Morton as OC and promote Kelvin Sheppard to DC, AP source says
item.description: The Detroit Lions have agreed to hire Denver Broncos assistant John Morton as offensive coordinator and promote Kelvin Sheppard to defensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Larry Lage, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ex-Bears coach Eberflus returns to Cowboys to run the defense; Sorensen takes over special teams
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — The Cowboys hired former Chicago Bears coach Matt Eberflus as defensive coordinator Tuesday for his second stint on the Dallas staff.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Warriors players Jackson-Davis, Spencer named to Rising Stars team
item.description: Golden State also rescheduled two games in March to adjust for games impacted by the Los Angeles wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Cal and Stanford feel the travel grind in their first ACC season
item.description: Plus, the Saint Mary's men are set to resume their rivalry with Gonzaga and the Cal women host North Carolina in a ranked showdown.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Faraudo, The Mercury News

item.title: Patrick Mahomes may make 'argument' for NFL GOAT with 3rd straight Super Bowl title, legendary kicker says
item.description: Super Bowl hero Adam Viniatieri said in a recent interview "there's definitely an argument" about Patrick Mahomes being the greatest player of all time.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scheyer: Duke's Maluach OK after vomiting on court during 2nd half of win over NC State
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Duke coach Jon Scheyer said freshman big man Khaman Maluach was OK after vomiting on the court during the second half of Monday night's 74-64 win against North Carolina State. The 7-foot-2 Maluach was standing just outside the lane near the baseline behind N.C.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UVU hoping to make first NCAA Tournament
item.description: OREM, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Duke, Michigan State, Auburn, Houston andUtah Valley? All of those college basketball teams own double-digit winning streaks right now, with the Wolverines having just won their tenth in a row.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Super Bowl footballs are ready to go within hours of the matchup being set
item.description: As soon as this year's Super Bowl matchup was set, workers at the Wilson Sporting Goods football factory jumped into action. The factory in the rural village of Ada, Ohio, makes the game balls used by every NFL team along with many of the nation’s top college programs and high schools.
item.dc:creator: JOHN SEEWER, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Florida coach Todd Golden cleared in Title IX investigation regarding stalking allegations
item.description: The University of Florida has cleared men's basketball coach Todd Golden following a four-month Title IX investigation into allegations of sexual exploitation, sexual harassment and stalking.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl LIX matchup set
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The stage is set for Super Bowl 59, with two heavyweights ready to clash: the Kansas City Chiefs and the Philadelphia Eagles. The game will feature marquee stars Patrick Mahomes, Jalen Hurts, Travis Kelce, and Saquon Barkley.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Utah HC ends road trip with 3-1 loss at Ottawa
item.description: OTTAWA (ABC4 Sports) - Leevi Merilainen made 34 saves, and the Ottawa Senators won 3-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Canadian Tire Centre on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Taylor Swift watches boyfriend Travis Kelce and the Chiefs beat the Bills and get back to Super Bowl
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — You could say that Taylor Swift's championship era has reached its second consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch. This time, Jalen Hurts and the Philadelphia Eagles have Saquon Barkley. The Eagles and Chiefs will face off for the Lombardi Trophy for the second time in three years on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: The Chiefs get more Mahomes magic and advance to 3rd straight Super Bowl, beating the Bills 32-29
item.description: Patrick Mahomes threw for 245 yards and a touchdown, ran through the Buffalo defense for two more scores, and relied on his defense at key moments to help the Kansas City Chiefs beat the Bills 32-29 on Sunday night and reach the Super Bowl for the third consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Bears hiring Declan Doyle as offensive coordinator
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — On the same evening the Chicago Bears are reportedly hiring their next defensive coordinator, the Bears have also committed to a new offensive coordinator under first-year head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: UVU wins 10th straight game, beating Seattle 70-66
item.description: SEATTLE (ABC4 Sports) - There is no slowing down the Utah Valley men's basketball team right now. Carter Welling scored a career-high 24 points, and Dominick Nelson added 16 as Utah Valley earned a hard-fought 70-66 road win over Seattle U on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tyrese Maxey has 31 points and 9 assists in the 76ers' 109-97 victory over the Bulls
item.description: Tyrese Maxey had 31 points and nine assists, Kelly Oubre Jr. added 22 points and 12 rebounds and the Philadelphia 76ers beat the Chicago Bulls 109-97 on Saturday night for their second straight victory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Kneepkens scores 32 as Utes hold off BYU, 81-76
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The last time Gianna Kneepkens played against BYU, she suffered a season-ending knee injury in December of 2023. This time around, Kneepkens had one of the best days of her career.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Kearny 67, Morse 53
item.description: The Komets were able to take down the Tigers tonight on Morse's homecourt, 67-53, as Kearny was led by Guards Caleb Fluhr and Julian Valladerez.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago faces Philadelphia on 4-game home slide
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (16-27, 11th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (19-26, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Bulls -3.5; over/under is 230.5 BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Philadelphia looking to stop its four-game home slide.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Australian Open: Keys upsets 2-time champion Sabalenka in women's final for 1st Grand Slam title
item.description: When Madison Keys stepped into Rod Laver Arena at 7:37 p.m. on Saturday night ahead of the Australian Open final, she strode right past the Daphne Akhurst Memorial Cup, the trophy that goes to the women's champion and was placed on a pedestal near the entrance to the court.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Winnipeg hat trick sinks Utah HC, 5-2
item.description: WINNIPEG (AP) - Three goals ended Utah's three-game winning streak. Cole Perfetti scored his first NHL hat trick, including the go-ahead goal, for the Winnipeg Jets in a 5-2 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Canada Life Centre on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hurricanes acquire Rantanen from Avs, Hall from Blackhawks in 3-team trade
item.description: For the second straight year, the Carolina Hurricanes are taking a significant swing to bolster a perennial playoff team.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers bring back Robert Saleh as defensive coordinator
item.description: (KRON) -- The San Francisco 49ers will fill their vacant defensive coordinator position with a familiar face. Robert Saleh will return to lead the team's defense after a tenure as the New York Jets' head coach, the 49ers announced Friday. Saleh was the 49ers' defensive coordinator from 2017-2020.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: CMU Women's Lacrosse looks to rewrite history
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Mesa University women's lacrosse team has been a dominant force in the Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference, finishing in second place for four straight years. This year, however, the Mavericks are determined to rewrite history.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Steph Curry to start NBA All-Star Game in San Francisco
item.description: (KRON) -- The NBA All-Star Game is set to happen in San Francisco next month, and the city's biggest star was named one of the game's 10 starters. The NBA revealed the starters on Thursday, and Stephen Curry was among them. It will be Curry's 11th All-Star Game.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Real Salt Lake adds striker Ariath Piol to attacking lineup from Australia A-League
item.description: Real Salt Lake is adding firepower to its attacking lineup, announcing on Thursday the club has signed 20-year-old Australian striker Ariath Piol to the team.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: NCDC Hockey Showcase Series coming to Grand Junction Feb. 8 and 9
item.description: On Feb. 8 and 9, River City Sportplex is hosting the Idaho Spud Kings and Rock Springs Grizzlies of the USPHL junior hockey league NCDC.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Oakland Roots soccer team eyes short-term home at Coliseum
item.description: (BCN) -- The Oakland Roots professional soccer team wants to continue playing at the Coliseum for the "short-term" following the 2025 season, according to team officials.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Cubs, WGN were early Chicago connections for Ben Johnson
item.description: CHICAGO — Like so many Cubs fans around the country, Ben Johnson also ran inside to watch Cubs baseball on WGN after school. In Johnson's highly-anticipated introductory press conference, he mentioned that he and his family go to a Cubs game once a year.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: NFL playoffs: Championship weekend on tap as 4 teams vie for a trip to Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The road to Super Bowl LIX ends Sunday. It's championship weekend, and by the time it's all over, we'll know which teams will represent the AFC and NFC on Sunday, Feb. 9, in New Orleans to play for the Lombardi Trophy.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
